Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem
NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 process safety system review support.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem used by neqsim.mcp.runners
    Class
    Description
    ProcessSafetySystemReviewReport
    Aggregated report for a NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 process safety system review.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem used by neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem
    Class
    Description
    ProcessSafetySystemAssessment
    One clause-level assessment in a NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 process safety system review.
    ProcessSafetySystemAssessment.Status
    Assessment status values used in report output.
    ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput
    Normalized input for a NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 process safety system review.
    ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem
    One process safety function, final element, protection layer, or evidence record in a Clause 10 review.
    ProcessSafetySystemReviewReport
    Aggregated report for a NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 process safety system review.
    ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult
    Review result for one process safety function or review coverage item.
    S001SecondaryPressureProtectionCriteria
    NORSOK S-001 Clause 10.4.7 screening criteria for instrumented secondary pressure protection.
    S001SecondaryPressureProtectionResult
    Result from NORSOK S-001 Clause 10.4.7 secondary pressure protection screening.
